it:67.2: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
it:67.3: "There are these three forms of sagacity. Which three? Bodily sagacity, verbal sagacity, and mental sagacity. These are the three forms of sagacity."
it:67.4: A sage in body, a sage in speech, a sage in mind, fermentation-free: a sage consummate in sagacity is said to be bathed of evil.
it:67.5: This, too, was the meaning of what was said by the Blessed One, so I have heard.
